name: acme-consulting
title: Acme Consulting — Generic B2B consulting brand kit template
_usage_note: This is a starter template. Copy it, rename it, and customize all fields for your own brand. Every field is a placeholder — change palette, typography, voice, and wordmark to match your identity.
voice: Professional, evidence-based, client-first. Avoid jargon. Lead with outcomes, not methodology.
logo_description: Placeholder — describe your logo here so GPT-Image-2 can reproduce it or respect its space in generated assets.
background_default: deep navy #0f172a with subtle dot-grid texture at 4% opacity
example_prompt_use: Replace 'acme-consulting' with your kit name, update palette hex values, typography, and voice. Pass this file as the brand_kit argument when calling gpt-image-2-techniques.
